description: Style Note This dress from femella is styled to become your new day-to-night staple. This versatile piece can be worn with opaque tights and block heels. You can also wear this with a structured jacket, the slim belt, a box clutch and heels for a dressier occasion.  Product Details Black and beige printed dress made of blended fabric, has a round neck, is sleeveless and has a concealed zipper on the left below the armhole Material and Care Blended fabric Wash dark colours separately Dry inside out Do not bleach or wring Warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8” and chest 32”) wears a size M
